name: simplycubed
description: SimplyCubed certified Agent Skills — scanned and verified. https://simplycubed.com/skills

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Removes signs of AI-generated writing so text reads naturally — detects and fixes inflated symbolism, promotional language, vague attributions, rule-of-three, and other tells from Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide. Use when editing or reviewing text.

plugins.name: linus-level
plugins.description: A 1.0–10.0 "engineering working-mode" dial for coding agents — tunes agency, assumption budget, verification, and security posture from fast prototyping to maintainer-grade rigor. Triggers on "Linus Level", "LL n", or set-rigor / maintainer-mode requests.

plugins.name: nothing-design
plugins.description: Applies the Nothing design system to UI work. Use when the user explicitly asks for "Nothing style", "Nothing design", or to apply the Nothing design system — never automatically for generic UI tasks.

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Browser automation with Playwright: auto-detects dev servers, writes test scripts, fills forms, takes screenshots, checks responsive design, validates UX, and tests login flows and links. Use to test websites or automate browser interactions.
